name: construction_era
short_description: Historical construction era when the house was originally built
reason_for_inclusion: Era of construction determines building standards, likelihood of basements, original exterior materials, and whether central AC was included; influences property age, basement presence, exterior condition, and central air installation

name: zoning_land_use_regulation
short_description: Restrictiveness of municipal zoning and land-use regulations applicable to the property
reason_for_inclusion: Zoning regulations constrain lot sizes, affect neighborhood character and quality; serves as a common cause of both lot size and neighborhood quality

name: sale_price
short_description: Sale price of the house in dollars
reason_for_inclusion: Target variable for regression modeling; represents the outcome to be predicted

name: square_feet
short_description: Total living area square footage of the house
reason_for_inclusion: Primary indicator of house size and strong predictor of sale price

name: lot_size
short_description: Total lot size in square feet
reason_for_inclusion: Reflects property land value and contributes to price prediction

name: bedrooms
short_description: Number of bedrooms in the house
reason_for_inclusion: Key feature in housing market; affects buyer demand and price

name: bathrooms
short_description: Number of bathrooms, including half-baths (0.5 increments)
reason_for_inclusion: Important amenity that strongly influences house price

name: property_age
short_description: Age of the property in years at time of sale
reason_for_inclusion: Captures depreciation and vintage effects on price

name: num_floors
short_description: Number of floors (stories) in the house
reason_for_inclusion: Indicates house layout and can affect price per square foot

name: total_rooms
short_description: Total number of rooms in the house (excluding bathrooms)
reason_for_inclusion: Overall measure of house size complementing square footage

name: garage_capacity
short_description: Number of cars the garage can accommodate
reason_for_inclusion: Desired feature that adds measurable value to a property

name: has_basement
short_description: Indicates whether the property has a basement
reason_for_inclusion: Basement presence adds usable space and influences price

name: basement_finish_type
reason_for_inclusion: Finished basement adds more value than unfinished; ordinal nature captures progression

name: exterior_condition
short_description: Rating of the exterior condition of the house
reason_for_inclusion: Condition rating impacts buyer perception and final sale price

name: neighborhood_quality
reason_for_inclusion: Location and neighborhood quality are among the strongest price determinants

name: has_fireplace
short_description: Indicates whether the house has a fireplace
reason_for_inclusion: Fireplace is a desirable amenity that can increase property value

name: central_air
short_description: Indicates whether the house has central air conditioning
reason_for_inclusion: Central air is a modern amenity strongly correlated with price and region desirability
